nodes.title: Add LoRA trigger to enhanced prompt?

widgets_values: If you don't have sam_vit_b and face_yolov8m models downloaded, open Manager -> Model Manager -> search for sam and bbox face models in the search bar, press install.

<---- Use at your own risk. Since the model used for prompt enhancement is only 4B (the same one used for the text encoder), the results can be unpredictable. You can tweak the prompt enhancement seed to get better results.

This feature uses a custom system prompt designed to format the enhancements closer to the training dataset.

My personal favourite combos:
1) euler + beta
2) er_sde + beta
3) euler + sgm_uniform
4) euler + beta57, shift at 6-8.

It's not as strict of a requirement as it was with SDXL, but it's still needed (you can blame the Qwen/Wan VAE for that). Petition for the Krea team to release a Flux 2 VAE version, anyone? 
Though, if you prefer the results without this pass, feel free to just skip it.

nodes.title: User Prompt
widgets_values: A young beautiful redheaded woman with green eyes. Nude and is leaning forward towards the viewer, exposing her cleavage. She is holding a large black dildo in right hand pointed towards her mouth in a playful feminine manner. Left arm under breast propping them up. Subtle droplets of water on her breasts. The woman has large-sized breasts and large-curvy ass. The background is a beach with view of ocean. Her ass is moved to the side. Her facial expression seductive smile and tongue out as she looks at the camera. The camera is position to view her full body.

# IMG2IMG ADDED

## To edit an image:
1. Load your image in 'IMG2IMG - Load Image Here' (id 211).
2. Set 'Use IMG2IMG?' (id 214) = TRUE.
3. IMPORTANT - lower the First Pass denoise:
   Enter the First Pass subgraph, find its KSampler, set denoise
   from 1.0 down to ~0.5 (0.4=subtle change, 0.7=heavy change).
   At denoise 1.0 it ignores your image completely.
4. Write a prompt describing the FINAL image you want.
5. Run.

## To go back to normal txt2img:
- Set 'Use IMG2IMG?' = FALSE.
- Set First Pass denoise back to 1.0.

## How it works:
Your image -> VAEEncode -> switch -> First Pass latent_image.
When switch=false it uses the EmptyLatentImage (normal generation).

An amateur photo shows a fair-skinned 20-years-old woman with messy blonde hair standing on a beach as the sun sets over the ocean. She wears a black bikini while she holds her hands in her hair. Sunlight creates a bright halo around her hair as white foam from the waves washes onto the sand behind her. The curvy woman has medium breasts, wide hips and thin waist, hourglass body.

nodes.title: System Prompt
widgets_values:
Role: Autonomous prompt expander for a vision-language model.
Task: Convert brief input into a fluid 7-9 sentence paragraph mirroring exact training data formats.

CRITICAL RULES:
- Zero Conversation: Output ONLY the descriptive paragraph. No intros, no meta-text, no regurgitation of rules.
- Absolute Autonomy: If input is short/vague, hallucinate ALL missing details. NEVER ask for details.
- Strictly Optical: Describe ONLY visible pixels. ZERO invisible senses (smells, sounds, temperature) or narrative conclusions.
- Mandatory Sequence: 
1) Subject & Action (use "naked"/"nude" if unclothed), 
2) Traits & Attire (assign age strictly as "18-years-old", "25-years-old" etc.), 
3) Setting & Background, 
4) Lighting & Dominant Colors, 
5) Camera Angle, 
6-9) Optical Micro-Details (textures, shadows).
- Banned Vocabulary: scent, smell, fragrance, sound, hears, feels, striking, embodies, personifying, narrative, masterpiece, hyper-realistic, realistic, 4k, possesses.

EXAMPLE INPUT:
woman on bed in a room. she is dressed

EXAMPLE OUTPUT:
A 25-years-old woman sits on the edge of a bed, leaning forward slightly with her hands resting on her knees. She wears a faded oversized band t-shirt and ripped black denim shorts, her dark hair pulled into a bun. The bedroom behind her is cluttered with clothes scattered across a wooden floor and posters peeling off the walls. The camera captures her in a medium-wide shot from a slightly high angle, emphasizing the clutter around her feet. A silver ring catches a glint of light on her right hand. The bedsheets are crumpled, showing tight folds and heavy creases where she sits.

Now, process the following input. Output ONLY the final visual description paragraph.

USER'S INPUT:
close-up photo of a face of a young woman
